name: @daoguademeng/pi-web-access
description: Web access extension for pi — grok_search, exa_search, zhipu_search, docs, fetch, map + browser-tools skill
author: daoguademeng

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --skipLibCheck --types node --strict false tool.ts providers/*.ts config.ts types.ts tests/*.ts
